title: Apiary
description: A lightweight mod that makes honeycombs magnetically fly to your inventory when harvesting with shears, eliminating dropped items.
body:
## 🐝 Apiary

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join%20Server-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/ZPXPEXdQQ9)

**Apiary** is a lightweight quality-of-life mod that makes harvesting honeycombs from bee nests and beehives smoother, cleaner, and more satisfying.

When you right-click a **full bee nest or beehive with shears**, honeycombs are instantly pulled straight into your inventory with a magical magnetic particle effect.  
No more scrambling to pick up dropped items!

---

## ✨ Features

- 🧲 **Magnetic Honeycomb Collection**  
  Honeycombs fly directly into your inventory instead of dropping on the ground.

- 🌀 **Double Helix Particle Trails**  
  Beautiful spiral golden trails form a double helix from block to player.

- 🌙 **Night & Moon Bonuses**  
  Harvest at night for +1 honeycomb. Full moon nights give double honeycombs!

- 🌧️ **Weather Bonuses**  
  Rain gives +1 bonus honeycomb and calms bees (no campfire needed). Biome-aware deserts don't count!

- ❄️ **Snow Biome Bonus**  
  Harvesting in snowy biomes during snowfall gives +1 honeycomb with snowflake particles.

- 🌸 **Flower Bonus**  
  Place 3+ flowers within 5 blocks of your hive for +1 honeycomb and adorable heart particles.

- 🍀 **Lucky Drop**  
  1% chance to get a bonus honey bottle with a magnificent firework celebration!

- ⚡ **Thunderstorm Effects**  
  Electric spark particles during thunderstorms for extra drama.

- 🔥 **Campfire & Soul Campfire Support**  
  Both regular and soul campfires calm bees, with a cozy smoke ring effect.

- 🎵 **Dynamic Audio**  
  Random pitch variation on shear sounds and a satisfying XP sound on bonus harvests.

- 🍯 **Vanilla Honey Bottles**  
  Honey bottle collection remains completely unchanged.

- 🔥 **Vanilla Bee Behavior Preserved**  
  Bees still get angry if you harvest without a campfire or rain — just like vanilla.

- ⚡ **Lightweight & Performance-Friendly**  
  No unnecessary overhead or gameplay changes.

- 📦 **Multi-Version Support**  
  Works on Minecraft **1.21.8, 1.21.9, 1.21.10, 1.21.11** (single JAR) and **26.1, 26.1.1, 26.1.2** (separate JAR).

---

## 🌙 Honeycomb Amounts

| Condition | Honeycombs |
|-----------|-----------|
| Day, clear | 3 |
| Day + rain | 4 |
| Day + flowers (3+) | 4 |
| Day + snow | 4 |
| Night, clear | 4 |
| Night + rain | 5 |
| Night + flowers | 5 |
| Full moon, clear | 6 |
| Full moon + rain | 7 |
| Full moon + rain + flowers | 8 |

Plus a **1% chance** for a bonus honey bottle on any harvest!

---

## 🌼 Why Apiary?

Perfect for beekeepers who want a smoother, more magical harvesting experience without altering core gameplay mechanics.

---

### 📋 Requirements

- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API

## 🐛 Bug Reports & Feature Requests

Found a bug or want a new feature? Join the Discord and let us know!

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Report%20Issues%20%26%20Suggest%20Features-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/ZPXPEXdQQ9)
